description: Use this API to list user-written FACTS device model definitions or to remove user-written FACTS device model definitions that are not assigned to any FACTS devices (unused) from the user model definition tables. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = fctmod_user(opt)

opt.description: list user-written FACTS device model definitions.
remove unused user-written FACTS device model definitions.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
